M

main(String[]) - Static method in class battleship.view.MainAny
Main method to start Battleship.
MainAny - Class in battleship.view
A processing view for the Battleship.
MainAny() - Constructor for class battleship.view.MainAny
 
mdType - Variable in class battleship.model.Cards
 
missedBlue - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
missedRed - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest

missileRBlue2 - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
missileRBlue4 - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
missileRRed1 - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest

missileRRed4 - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
missileWBlue - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
missileWRed - Variable in class battleship.model.CardsTest
 
mouseReleased() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Control method for mouse release.
move() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGameTest
 
move(Cards, Cards) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
Depending on the played card and the card, on which played, it is called the moveE() method or moveO() method.
moveE(Cards, Cards) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
It is the move method to play on enemy card.
moveJ() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGameTest
 
moveJ(Cards, Cards, BattleshipGame) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
This method is the main game move method for JShell.
moveO(Cards, Cards) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
It is the move method to play on own card.
